planetary_ruler: Mars/Aries (by sign); traditionally ruled by Mars in lunar mansion cycles
recommended_works: ["Begin journeys (safe travel and return)", "Take medicines", "Travel safely and return in good health", "Root for any image involving journeying", "Place discord and enmity between husband and wife", "Sow discord between two allies", "Cause servants to flee"]
forbidden_works: None explicitly forbidden; however evil works (discord, enmity) are done when Moon is combust or with Saturn/Mars
pliny_image: {"description": "Image of a black man with his hair wrapped and encircled, standing on his feet, having in his right hand a spear in the manner of a warrior", "material": "Iron ring", "suffumigation": "Liquid storax", "seal": "Black wax", "incantation": "You, Geriz, kill N son of N, or N wife of N, quickly and speedily and destroy them", "spirit_name": "Geriz", "purpose": "Destruction and depopulation", "source": "Book IV, Chapter 9"}

notes: The wise of India begin journeys and take medicines when the Moon is in this Mansion.

planetary_ruler: Venus/Taurus (approaching); traditionally Mercury in some systems
recommended_works: ["Dig for streams and wells", "Find hidden treasures", "Plant large amounts of wheat", "Destroy buildings before they are completed", "Enrage one man against another", "Strengthen and firm the incarceration of captives"]
pliny_image: {"description": "Form of a crowned king made from white wax and mastic", "material": "White wax and mastic", "suffumigation": "Lignum aloes", "incantation": "You, Enedil, drive away this anger from me, and let me be reconciled with him, and let my petition be satisfactory to him", "spirit_name": "Enedil", "purpose": "Removal of anger", "source": "Book IV, Chapter 9"}
picatrix_citation: {"primary": "Book IV, Chapter 5", "secondary": "Book IV, Chapter 9 (as 'Albotayn' per Pliny)"}
notes: Associated with water-finding and treasure hunting.

meaning: The Pleiades / The Many Little Ones
recommended_works: ["Sail safely on the sea and return safely", "Firmly incarcerate captives", "Complete works of alchemy", "All works done by fire", "Hunt in the country", "Cause love between man and wife"]
pliny_image: {"description": "Figure of a seated woman with her right hand over her head, wrapped in cloth", "material": "Silver ring with square table", "suffumigation": "Musk, camphor, mastic, and aromatic oils", "incantation": "You, Annuncia, make it so", "spirit_name": "Annuncia", "purpose": "Acquisition of all good things", "source": "Book IV, Chapter 9"}
picatrix_citation: {"primary": "Book IV, Chapter 5", "secondary": "Book IV, Chapter 9 (as 'Azoraye/Pleiades' per Pliny)"}
notes: Corresponds to the Pleiades star cluster. Safe voyages and alchemy.

recommended_works: ["Destroy cities and villages", "Destroy any building you wish not to endure", "Make a lord despise his servant", "Place discord between man and wife", "Destroy fountains, streams, and underground treasure-seekers", "Kill and bind all reptiles and venomous animals"]
forbidden_works: None explicitly listed (this is a malefic mansion)
pliny_image: {"description": "Knight riding on a horse, holding a serpent in his right hand", "material": "Red wax", "suffumigation": "Red myrrh and storax", "incantation": "You, Assarez, make it so and fulfill my request", "spirit_name": "Assarez", "purpose": "Obtaining enmity", "source": "Book IV, Chapter 9"}

recommended_works: ["Youths to learn arts and occupations", "Salvation of travelers and quick return", "Sailors to travel safely", "Improve buildings", "Destroy friendship between two people", "Favor between husband and wife (when Moon is in humane sign, safe from Saturn, Mars, and solar combustion)"]
pliny_image: {"description": "Fashion from silver a head without a body, above the head write the name of the lord of this mansion and your petition", "material": "Silver", "suffumigation": "Sandalwood", "incantation": "You, Cabil, do such and such for me and let my petition be granted", "spirit_name": "Cabil", "purpose": "Receiving good from kings and high officials", "source": "Book IV, Chapter 9"}
notes: The text gives 'Cabil' as the spirit name for this mansion in Chapter 9, but also shows 'Assarez' as lord in some MSS. Good for education and learning. Works should be done when Moon is rising in a humane sign (Gemini, Virgo, Libra, Sagittarius, Aquarius).

recommended_works: ["Destroy cities and villages", "Besiege cities with armies", "King's enemies to exact vengeance", "Destroy crops and trees", "Cause friendship between two people", "Improve hunting in the country", "Destroy medicines so they do not work when taken"]

notes: Mixed nature - can be used for both destruction and friendship.

recommended_works: ["Increase merchandise and profit", "Travel safely", "Increase crops", "Sail beneficially on water", "Cause friendship between friends and allies", "Expel flies from wherever you wish", "Destroy officials", "Go into presence of king or high nobles", "Cause kings and lords to be benevolent"]

recommended_works: ["Love between man and wife", "Destroy enemies", "Make firm the incarceration of captives", "Strengthen and complete buildings", "Love of allies and mutual help"]
